category_sources: Official Teleport docs describe an Infrastructure Identity Platform for access to apps, servers, databases, Kubernetes, desktops, and cloud resources.
source_facts.description says Teleport is a modern SSH server for teams managing distributed infrastructure.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and docs use the product name Teleport.
docs_sources: Official Teleport documentation is hosted at goteleport.com/docs/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/gravitational/teleport, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Teleport docs describe identity-based access, SSH, Kubernetes, databases, apps, and infrastructure resources.
source_facts.description mentions SSH and distributed infrastructure.
